title: Alsinella subulata
intro: Alsinella subulata, also known as Alsinella, is a flowering plant species within the primrose family (Primulaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects, contributing to its potential health benefits, such as wound healing and antimicrobial protection. Bioactive constituents of Alsinella subulata include iridoids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its therapeutic effects. The most common herbal preparations made with Alsinella subulata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and infections.
